# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - external-api.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - external-api.example.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  - mysql.external-db.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  - mysql.external-db.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-api-dr
spec:
  host: api.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.thirdparty.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-db-dr
spec:
  host: postgres.external-db.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: postgres.external-db.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - secure-api.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - secure-api.example.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: secure-api.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-dr
spec:
  host: secure-api.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: secure-api.example.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: restricted-external-db-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - restricted-db.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: restricted-external-db-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - restricted-db.example.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: restricted-db.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: restricted-external-db-dr
spec:
  host: restricted-db.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: restricted-db.example.com
